overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Assassin's Creed Mirage showing the protagonist Basim running through a historical Middle Eastern city (Baghdad). The character navigates through covered market walkways, narrow alleys with wooden scaffolding, open market squares with red banners, and passes through a fortified city gate. The environment features stone architecture, market stalls, and numerous NPC pedestrians.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered market walkway with stalls transitioning to stone bridge

agents.ego_description: running through market stalls, up stone stairs, and across a covered bridge walkway

notable_agents.action: vendor standing by green canopy stall watching the character pass
pedestrian in purple robe walking toward the camera

entered.detail: wooden market stall with green fabric canopy and hanging goods
stacked wooden crates and barrels beside the path
large stone archway forming the entrance to the bridge
market stall displaying clay pots and urns
decorative carved stone railing along the walkway
wooden lattice privacy screen attached to building

segments.scene_description: The character runs through a covered market area with green canopy stalls and wooden crates, then ascends stone stairs onto a bridge with carved railings. The path leads through a stone archway while pedestrians move about the market space.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow back alley with construction scaffolding and dust

events.description: exits covered market bridge into narrow dusty alley with wooden scaffolding

agents.ego_description: sprinting through narrow alleys past construction scaffolding and a hay cart

notable_agents.action: worker in green tunic walking along the scaffolding
woman in green dress sitting against the wall

entered.detail: tall wooden construction scaffolding against the building facade
wooden cart loaded with hay bales parked on the street
tall stone walls enclosing the narrow alleyway

segments.scene_description: The character emerges from the covered bridge into a narrow, dusty alley flanked by stone walls and wooden construction scaffolding. A hay cart sits on the left while sparse pedestrians move through the confined space.

scene_state.functional_zone: open market square with hanging red banners and palm trees

events.description: emerges from narrow alley into open market square with red banners overhead

agents.ego_description: running through bustling market square weaving between pedestrians and stalls

notable_agents.action: man in white robe running in the same direction alongside the character
group of pedestrians browsing goods at market stalls

entered.detail: string of red triangular banners hanging across the street overhead
tall palm tree rising above the market buildings
wooden market stalls with awnings lining the street
wide stone steps leading up to building entrances

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into a wide market square bathed in bright sunlight, with red banners strung overhead and palm trees visible in the distance. The character runs along a herringbone-patterned stone street lined with market stalls while numerous pedestrians walk and browse.

scene_state.functional_zone: fortified city gate with sandbag barricades and guard presence

events.description: approaches large fortified gate with sandbag walls and armed guards
passes through the dark gate archway into the sunlit district beyond

agents.ego_description: sprinting toward and through the city gate, weaving between guards and pedestrians

notable_agents.action: armed guard in red uniform and turban standing watch near the gate
child in blue robe running through the gate passage

entered.detail: massive fortified stone gate with pointed arch and decorative blue tilework
walls of stacked sandbags flanking the gate entrance
green canvas tents set up for guards near the gate
tall stone minaret visible in the distance through the gate
intricate blue ceramic tile patterns on the gate walls

segments.scene_description: The character approaches a massive fortified gate flanked by sandbag barricades and guarded by soldiers in red uniforms. After passing through the dark archway with decorative blue tiles, the character emerges into a sunlit plaza with a distant minaret visible, completing the transition to a new district.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a bustling urban environment that transitions from enclosed market walkways into a wide, sunlit plaza. It begins with the character running through a covered market under green canopies before ascending stone stairs and passing through a carved archway. As the camera emerges from the bridge, the space tightens into a dusty, narrow alley flanked by stone walls and wooden scaffolding. The scene then opens abruptly into a bright market square filled with red banners and palm trees, where the character navigates a herringbone-patterned street crowded with pedestrians. Finally, the path leads through a massive fortified gate guarded by soldiers and decorated with blue tiles, emerging into a sunlit plaza with a distant minaret.
